<!--
Simple PR template to help contributors and reviewers.
Fill in the sections below when opening a PR.
-->

# Pull Request

## Summary

Provide a short description of the change and the reason for it.

## Related issues

Link any related issues or PRs (e.g. "Closes #123").

## Type of change
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / Maintenance

## Checklist
- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and followed the project style
- [ ] I added tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Linting passes locally (backend: ruff; frontend: eslint)
- [ ] CI passes on GitHub Actions

## How to test / reproduce
Provide clear steps to reproduce the behavior or validate the change.

## Notes for the reviewer
Anything specific reviewers should look for, or special deployment notes.
